title: Hello Ruby
description: Write a script that outputs the classic 'Hello, Ruby!' message to the console.
problemStatement:
Welcome to Ruby! Write a single line of code that prints the string `"Hello, Ruby!"` followed by a newline to the standard output.

**Requirement:** Use the `puts` method.
hints: `puts` (short for 'put string') is the most common way to print output in Ruby.
